questions.text: What made the Rainbow Fish special?
questions.explanation: The Rainbow Fish had beautiful, shimmering scales that made him stand out from other fish.

questions.text: The Rainbow Fish learned to share his scales with other fish.
questions.explanation: The story teaches the value of sharing. The Rainbow Fish became happy when he shared his beautiful scales.

questions.text: What lesson does the Rainbow Fish learn?
questions.explanation: The Rainbow Fish learns that sharing his beautiful scales with other fish brings him true happiness and friendship.

questions.text: The Rainbow Fish lived in the deep blue ________.
questions.explanation: The story is set in the deep blue ocean where the Rainbow Fish lived with other sea creatures.
